subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Bless this family and grant them prosperity in both worlds. Make this honored soul triumphant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: خداوندا این خاندان را مبارک فرما و در دو جهان کامران نما این شخص محترم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @unity; oneness of humanity
full_text_parts: O Lord! Bless this family and grant it happiness in both this world and the world to come. Confirm this distinguished person in the greatest service to the human world, which is the unity of all mankind, that he may attain to Thy good-pleasure in this world and obtain a bounteous portion from the surging ocean of divine outpourings in this luminous age.
